content.reviewer_comment_en: Figure 6A provides compelling qualitative confocal microscopy images demonstrating the cellular uptake of the engineered EVs and the elastase-triggered antibody release. It is recommended to provide flow cytometry quantification of the cellular uptake.
content.reviewer_intent_zh: 审稿人核心关切：Figure 6A provides compelling qualitative confocal microscopy images demonstrating the cellular uptake of the engineered EVs and the elastase-triggered antibody release. It is recommended to provide flow cytometry quanti...
content.reviewer_intent_en: Interpretation: The reviewer is requesting a clear, evidence-aligned clarification and a concrete manuscript-level correction for this specific point.
content.response_en: We appreciate this constructive recommendation. We have incorporated the requested clarification and updated the corresponding section in the revised manuscript.
content.response_zh: 中文对应：感谢审稿人意见。我们已针对该问题完成对应修订，并确保结论与证据保持一致。
content.revision_location_en: Section: 3.5 Evaluation of cellular uptake and pancreatic targeting ability of Fc-EL-EV@Que | Paragraph index: 129
content.original_excerpt_en: The primary design was to develop a multi-drug-loading platform (including antibodies and small molecular drugs) based on the engineered EVs. Therefore, we mainly evaluated the pancreatic targeting ability of Fc-EL-EV platform. Firstly, we performed in vitro experiments to observe cellular uptake of Fc-EL-EV using confocal laser scanning microscope (CLSM). Due to the original engineered EVs had already labeled by mCherry protein in the fusion construct, to further investigate the binding antibody, GFP-IgG was added to represent the loaded antibodies. As shown in Figure 6A, free antibodies exhibited much weaker ability to enter MPC-38 cells when compared to AbGFP-Fc-EL-EVmCherry integrated antibodies. It was observed that normal EVs without gene manipulation could not effectively load antibodies, thus intracellular green signals lacked while red signals accumulated. Only Fc-EL-EVmCherry could integrate with GFP-IgG, and the CLSM images showed a large amount of red and green signals co-localization in MPC-38 cells. However, if we added EL before AbGFP-Fc-EL-EVmCherry treating cells, the GFP-IgG would release from the vesicles and the fluorescent images demonstrated a similar result with GFP-control-EV group. Therefore, we have successfully demonstrated that our formulation could release antibodies in the SAP region with high EL existence, and carry drugs into cells, exerting the dual effects of neutralizing extracellular Prdx1 and promoting intracellular Prdx1 expression.

modification_actions.reason: 审稿人要求补充缺失信息或证据。
